title: Dataset of the microbial communities in chronosequences samples from the MINOTAUR Project
author: Del Duca, Sara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The MINOTAUR chronosequences microbiological dataset includes five sheets detailing soil biodiversity dynamics across Europe. It features metadata, DNA extraction metrics, bacterial ASV abundances from 16S NGS sequencing, and taxonomic affiliations, alongside contact and funding details.
steps_raw: The MINOTAUR chronosequences microbiological dataset includes five sheets detailing soil biodiversity dynamics across Europe. It features metadata, DNA extraction metrics, bacterial ASV abundances from 16S NGS sequencing, and taxonomic affiliations, alongside contact and funding details.
